items.title: U.S. considering tactic shift to get Pulisic on track
items.summary: United States coach Mauricio Pochettino said he's considering some tactical tweaks to help get star attacker Christian Pulisic back to his best in front of the goal.

items.title: Cardiff's $138M claim in Sala's death dismissed
items.summary: A commercial court in France dismissed Welsh club Cardiff's claims for compensation in the death of Emiliano Sala in a ruling issued Monday, more than seven years after the plane crash that killed the Argentine forward.

items.title: Italy veterans aware 2026 WC is their 'last chance'
items.summary: The pressure is on Italy since an entire generation, basically anyone under 15, has no memory of the last time the Azzurri played in the World Cup -- an elimination loss to Uruguay in 2014 in Brazil.

items.title: Sources: Spurs pushing for De Zerbi this season
items.summary: Tottenham are pushing to convince Roberto De Zerbi to become their new manager before the end of the season, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Schweinsteiger waarschuwt Duitsers voor WK: 'Zo gaat het tegen Curaçao wellicht ook'
items.summary: Duitsland won maandagavond de oefenwedstrijd tegen Ghana , maar een voetbalfeest was het niet bepaald. Oud-international Bastian Schweinsteiger, tegenwoordig werkzaam als analyticus, ziet een gevaar voor Die Mannschaft .

items.title: How has USMNT player pool evolved since 2022, and what does it mean for World Cup?
items.summary: It's been a weird four-year World Cup cycle for the USMNT, but heading into 2026, how well is this team set up for success this year and in 2030?

items.title: Infantino wil dat Iran erbij is op het WK: 'Er is geen plan B'
items.summary: Gianni Infantino gaat ervan uit dat Iran gewoon zal meedoen aan het aankomende WK. 'Er is geen plan B, C of D', zei de voorzitter van wereldvoetbalbond FIFA in een interview met de Mexicaanse televisiezender N+ Univision. 'Er is alleen een plan A.'

items.title: Opvallend: Argentijnse bondscoach weet nog niet of Messi meegaat naar het WK
items.summary: Tweeënhalve maand voor de start van het WK durft Lionel Scaloni nog niet te zeggen of Lionel Messi erbij is op de mondiale eindronde. 'We hopen dat hij meegaat naar het WK, veel meer kan ik daar nog niet over zeggen', aldus de Argentijnse bondscoach. Eind vorig jaar gaf Messi aan alleen te gaan als hij echt op zijn best is .

items.title: Luckassen debuteert met nederlaag: Undav schiet Duitsland naar late zege
items.summary: Duitsland heeft de interlandperiode maandag afgesloten met een benauwde overwinning op Ghana. De viervoudig wereldkampioen maakte vlak voor tijd het verschil tegen de Afrikaanse grootmacht. Derrick Luckassen maakte zijn interlanddebuut voor Ghana.

items.title: Reiziger: 'Ik kan niet tegen niet durven, je móét van mij lef tonen'
items.summary: Jong Oranje won maandagavond de oefenwedstrijd tegen Jong België en kon die opsteker wel gebruiken, nu het in de EK-kwalificatiecyclus voor geen meter loopt. Bondscoach Michael Reiziger zit met dat laatste behoorlijk in zijn maag.

items.title: ‘I don’t need a crutch’: Roy Hodgson relishes Bristol City return at age of 78
items.summary: Veteran returns to club 44 years after being sacked ‘It boils down to two words: energy and enthusiasm’ Roy Hodgson insisted he does not require “a crutch” after making a shock return to Bristol City at 78 years old and believes he is healthier than when last coaching two years ago, when he was taken ill at Crystal Palace. The former England manager, who took training at the Championship club for the first time on Monday, has taken interim charge for the final seven games of the season. Hodgson left Palace in February 2024, four days after collapsing at training, but he was tempted out of retirement by Richard Scudamore, the former Premier League chief executive who joined City’s board last October. Hodgson was at home in Richmond, west London, when he received a message out of the blue from Scudamore, a lifelong City fan, asking if he could pick his brains. Continue reading...

items.title: Tottenham close to appointing Roberto De Zerbi as new manager after talks
items.summary: De Zerbi is only candidate currently talking to Spurs Tottenham intend to give Italian a long-term contract Roberto De Zerbi has moved closer to becoming Tottenham’s new manager after further negotiations on Monday. The club have made him their prime target to replace Igor Tudor and save them from what would be a ruinous relegation to the Championship. De Zerbi is in fact the only live candidate given that Spurs are not talking to anyone else. The makeup of his backroom staff has also been discussed. Continue reading...

items.title: Thomas Tuchel has ‘100% trust’ in Rice and Saka over England injury absences
items.summary: Arsenal duo unavailable for Japan game on Tuesday ‘We did medical tests. I saw them,’ head coach says Thomas Tuchel has plotted a diplomatic course through the storm that has followed the withdrawals of Declan Rice and Bukayo Saka from the England squad, saying the optics may look bad but he has “100% trust” in their integrity. The England head coach gave Rice and Saka last week off, letting them rest rather than play in the 1-1 draw against Uruguay at Wembley on Friday – along with nine others. His idea was to have all 11 back for the game against Japan on Tuesday, also at Wembley, for which he would release a group of players. Continue reading...

items.title: Fit-again McGinn was 'petrified' he would miss World Cup
items.summary: John McGinn has been a Scotland international for a decade now as he looks forward to the World Cup after a big injury scare.

items.title: Five Euro 2028 tickets 'cost same as World Cup parking space'
items.summary: Uefa is to expected to broadly freeze prices at Euro 2028 - meaning supporters would be able to buy five tickets for the cost of one parking space at a World Cup stadium this summer.

items.title: 'This is bigger than football' - DR Congo bid to end 52-year World Cup wait
items.summary: DR Congo face Jamaica in a World Cup play-off, hoping to reach the tournament for the first time since 1974, a campaign memorable for the wrong reasons.

items.title: How Sky can ignore limit on its TV picks & why fans are fed up
items.summary: Premier League games being moved to Friday or Monday are a headache for the fans of some clubs. Is the system fair, and how does it work for Sky?

items.title: De Zerbi in advanced talks to become Spurs manager
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur enter into advanced talks with Roberto de Zerbi, with the former Brighton manager now willing to take charge immediately, according to sources.

items.title: Court dismisses Cardiff’s £106m claim against Nantes over Emiliano Sala’s death
items.summary: French court rules against club in damages claim Sala died in 2019 plane crash on way to Wales A commercial court in France has dismissed Cardiff’s claim for more than £100m compensation after the death of Emiliano Sala. Seven years after the plane crash that killed Sala, Cardiff were seeking €122m (£106m) for loss of income and other damages from the player’s former team Nantes. Rulings by Fifa, the court of arbitration for sport and Switzerland’s supreme court have gone against Cardiff in their legal dispute with Nantes since Sala died in January 2019. Continue reading...

items.title: Amnesty International warns Fifa World Cup risks becoming ‘stage for repression’
items.summary: Group says US is facing a ‘human rights emergency’ ICE director said agency will play ‘key part’ at tournament Amnesty International has warned that the World Cup, spread across three North American countries, risks becoming a “stage for repression”. The human rights organisation published a report on Monday – “Humanity Must Win” – calling on Fifa and the host countries, the US, Canada and Mexico, to take urgent action to protect fans, players and other communities. Fifa has promised a tournament where everyone “feels safe, included and free to exercise their rights”. But Amnesty said that pledge sat in “stark contrast” to conditions in all three host nations, especially the US, which hosts three-quarters of the 104 matches. Continue reading...

items.title: Thorgan Hazard prolongera-t-il à Anderlecht ? La balle est dans son camp !
items.summary: Thorgan Hazard, meilleur buteur du RSC Anderlecht, arrive en fin de contrat en juin prochain. On évoque depuis longtemps une prolongation potentielle.

items.title: Het aftellen kan beginnen! Op deze dag maakt Rudi Garcia de definitieve WK-selectie bekend
items.summary: De Rode Duivels zitte in volle voorbereiding richting het WK van komende zomer in de Verenigde Staten, Canada en Mexico. Ondertussen weten we ook wanneer Rudi Garcia van plan is om zijn selectie bekend te maken.

items.title: Voici le coach qui devra sauver Tottenham du cataclysme de la relégation
items.summary: Tottenham est au bord du gouffre. Les Spurs sont un point devant la zone rouge, et ont licencié Igor Tudor pour tenter un électrochoc nécessaire.

items.title: Verhuizen naar Mexico? Géén deelname? Gianni Infantino komt met nieuws over Iran op WK én dat is belangrijk voor de Rode Duivels
items.summary: België neemt het op het WK deze zomer op tegen Egypte, Nieuw-Zeeland en... Iran. Die laatste tegenstander zal overigens niét wijzigen.

items.title: 🎥 Hilarische beelden! Nathan De Cat moét liedje zingen bij de Rode Duivels
items.summary: Nathan De Cat debuteerde afgelopen zaterdag bij de Rode Duivels. Ondertussen kreeg het jeugdproduct van RSC Anderlecht al zijn internationale doop. Het moet gezegd: de beelden zijn hilarisch.

items.title: Affaire Emiliano Sala : le verdict est tombé, le FC Nantes souffle
items.summary: Plus de sept ans après le décès tragique d'Emiliano Sala dans un accident d'avion après son transfert à Cardiff City, le procès opposant le club gallois au FC Nantes a livré son verdict.

items.title: Drôle de retournement de situation pour Nicolo Tresoldi, dragué par une troisième fédération !
items.summary: L'avenir de Nicolo Tresoldi est entouré de points d'interrogation - que ce soit en club... ou en sélection.

items.title: Er moet Stef Wils nog iets van het hart: "Het was zijn goed recht, maar Gheysens heeft me amper gesproken"
items.summary: Stef Wils werd in november ontslagen als coach van Antwerp FC. Die beslissing werd genomen door Paul Gheysens. Al heeft de voormalige coach van de roodhemden daar iets aan toe te voegen.

items.title: Défaite en amical pour les Diablotins face aux Pays-Bas
items.summary: Après leur courte victoire contre l'Autriche, les Espoirs se rendaient à Venlo pour y défier les U21 néerlandais. Ils se sont inclinés.

items.title: Rechtbank doet (eindelijk) uitspraak over schadeclaim van Cardiff City aan Nantes na dood van Emiliano Sala
items.summary: Emiliano Sala overleed in januari 2019 bij een vliegtuigcrash. Ondertussen is er een uitspraak in de rechtszaak die Cardiff City FC had aangespannen tegen Nantes FC.
